description:
GIVEN a user launches the app
AND the user has TTS enabled
AND the app has "Shows" in the header

steps.action: WHEN a user focuses on the "Shows" button
steps.result:
THEN the app reader says “Shows, press select to explore long form MLB content, X of X in the menu, press right or left for more items in the menu”

NOTE: X should be based on how many buttons are visible to the user in the menu and the place that Shows is in that order
